title: Can I limit the creation of column templates to workspaces?
excerpt:
Hi there, 
It would be great to as an admin limit the amount of templates made. 
Also I would like to see in which workspace the column has been created. Not all templates are used over different workspaces. 
Many thanks…

posts.author: MStam (Maxine Stam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

It would be great to as an admin limit the amount of templates made.

Also I would like to see in which workspace the column has been created. Not all templates are used over different workspaces.

Many thanks,
Maxine

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @MStam,

How are you creating these “column templates”?

posts.author: MStam (Maxine Stam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matias,

By clicking on the three dots that appear on the header of the column, then saving as template.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @MStam,

I will be moving this topic to the relevant section, since this is not related to the apps framework or the API.

Someone will take a look into it in the new section

Cheers,
Matias
